title: Sampling - Darker Trashed Mix
meaning_summary: Its mix framing and darker electronic positioning suggest a track that earns through specialist taste, repeat use, and catalog exploration rather than broad mainstream traffic.
revenue_drivers: Alternative mixes can extend catalog life by giving listeners a second entry point.
Electronic niche audiences often replay mood-specific tracks more deeply than casual pop listeners.
Independent release economics can leave a relatively strong artist-side share even at small scale.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes modest but real independent streaming, creator-controlled economics, and slower-burn long-tail replay from niche listeners.

ownership.notes: Modeled from independent electronic release behavior, not disclosed statements.
